name: ondewo-client-utils

metadata.name: ondewo-client-utils
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: This library contains utilities and base classes for gRPC clients.

documentation: Ondewo Client Utils Library ====================== This library contains base classes and utilities for higher-level interface clients interacting with gRPC servers. Python Installation ------------------- You can install the library by installing it directly from the pypi: ```bash pip install ondewo-client-utils ``` Or, you could clone it and install the requirements: ```bash git clone git@github.com:ondewo/ondewo-client-utils-python.git cd ondewo-client-utils-python pip install -e . ```

classes.name: ondewo.utils.base_client_config.BaseClientConfig

methods.name: ondewo.utils.base_client_config.BaseClientConfig.host_and_port
documentation:
Returns the host and port as a single string.

Returns:
    str: The host and port in the format "host:port".

Configuration for the ONDEWO python client.

Attributes:
    host (str):
        IP address of the ONDEWO QA services host (e.g., 'localhost', '127.22.444.11', etc.)
    port (str):
        Port of the ONDEWO QA services host (e.g., '50444', etc.)
    grpc_cert (Optional[str]):
        The certificate required for setting up a secure gRPC channel. This field must be set unless
        the client is instantiated using `use_secure_channel=False` (not recommended).

classes.name: ondewo.utils.base_client.BaseClient

methods.name: ondewo.utils.base_client.BaseClient._initialize_services
documentation:
Initialize the service clients.

Args:
    config (BaseClientConfig):
        Configuration for the client.
    use_secure_channel (bool):
        Whether to use a secure gRPC channel.
    options (Optional[Set[Tuple[str, Any]]]):
        Additional options for the gRPC channel.

methods.name: ondewo.utils.base_client.BaseClient.connect
documentation:
Establish a connection to the services.

Args:
    config (BaseClientConfig):
        Configuration for the client.
    use_secure_channel (bool):
        Whether to use a secure gRPC channel.
    options (Optional[Set[Tuple[str, Any]]]):
        Additional options for the gRPC channel.

Raises:
    ConnectionError: If a connection is already established.

methods.name: ondewo.utils.base_client.BaseClient.disconnect
documentation:
Disconnect all gRPC channels and clear the services.

Raises:
    AttributeError: If `services` is not defined.

Abstract base class for ONDEWO clients.

Attributes:
    services: A container for the service clients initialized by the client.
